name: codex-skills-kit
description: Task-typed prompt-engineering skills for delegating work to OpenAI Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Task prompts and retrospectives for Codex
interface.longDescription: Codex Skills Kit bundles two reusable Agent Skills: codex-prompt for generating self-contained Codex task prompts, and retro-distill for turning completed sessions into durable skill and convention updates.
defaultPrompt: Use $codex-prompt to draft a Codex task prompt.
Use $retro-distill to run a quick retrospective.
